hooks.command: python -c "import json; content = open('.claude/memory.md', encoding='utf-8').read(); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'UserPromptSubmit', 'additionalContext': '=== Project Memory (.claude/memory.md) ===\n' + content}}))" 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"systemMessage": "REQUIRED: You must now update .claude/memory.md to reflect every change made this turn — new files, modified logic, UI changes, bug fixes, decisions. Do not skip this step."}'
